def process_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> dict:
    pending = [o for o in orders if o["status"] == "pending"]
    count = len(pending)
    
    for order in pending:
        process(order)
    
    return {"processed": count}


def analyze_users(users: list[dict]) -> dict:
    active = [u for u in users if u["is_active"]]
    active_count = len(active)
    
    premium = [u for u in active if u["tier"] == "premium"]
    premium_count = len(premium)
    
    for user in premium:
        send_notification(user)
    
    return {"active": active_count, "premium": premium_count}


def validate_items(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    valid = [i for i in items if i["quantity"] > 0]
    total = len(valid)
    
    results = []
    for item in valid:
        result = validate(item)
        results.append(result)
    
    return results
